workflow.name: YugabyteDB HA existing
workflow.description: Bootstrap and validate YugabyteDB HA from an existing automation runner and target inventory.

data.label: Prepare YugabyteDB inventory
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
apt-get update
DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y ansible sshpass
cat >/tmp/yugabytedb-inventory.ini <<'INVENTORY'
[yugabytedb]
10.31.88.11 role=yugabyte name=yugabytedb-01
10.31.88.12 role=yugabyte name=yugabytedb-02
10.31.88.13 role=yugabyte name=yugabytedb-03
INVENTORY

data.label: Install YugabyteDB container runtime
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/yugabytedb-runtime.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: yugabytedb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.shell: |
        if command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          docker --version
          exit 0
        fi
        if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          apt-get update
          DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v dnf >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          dnf install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        elif command -v yum >/dev/null 2>&1; then
          yum install -y docker docker-compose-plugin
        fi
        systemctl enable --now docker
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/yugabytedb-inventory.ini /tmp/yugabytedb-runtime.yml

data.label: Render YugabyteDB cluster manifests
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/yugabytedb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
- hosts: yugabytedb
  become: true
  tasks:
    - ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /opt/octastack/yugabytedb
        state: directory
        mode: "0750"
    - ansible.builtin.copy:
        dest: /opt/octastack/yugabytedb/compose.yml
        mode: "0640"
        content: |
          services:
            yugabytedb:
              image: yugabytedb/yugabyte:2.23.0.0-b710
              container_name: octastack-yugabytedb
              restart: unless-stopped
              command: "bin/yugabyted start --foreground"
              ports:
                - "5433:5433"
                - "7000:7000"
                - "9000:9000"
              volumes:
                - data:/root/var
          volumes:
            data: {}
PLAYBOOK

data.label: Deploy YugabyteDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >>/tmp/yugabytedb-deploy.yml <<'PLAYBOOK'
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/yugabytedb/compose.yml pull
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/yugabytedb/compose.yml up -d
    - ansible.builtin.shell: docker compose -f /opt/octastack/yugabytedb/compose.yml ps
PLAYBOOK
ansible-playbook -i /tmp/yugabytedb-inventory.ini /tmp/yugabytedb-deploy.yml

data.label: Document YugabyteDB topology
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
cat >/tmp/yugabytedb-topology.md <<'EOF'
# YugabyteDB HA topology

Members:
- yugabytedb-01: 10.31.88.11 (yugabyte)
- yugabytedb-02: 10.31.88.12 (yugabyte)
- yugabytedb-03: 10.31.88.13 (yugabyte)

This example deploys one YugabyteDB container per member host. Replace the placeholder commands with vendor-supported clustering, TLS, backup, and failover automation before production use.
EOF
cat /tmp/yugabytedb-topology.md

data.label: Validate YugabyteDB cluster
data.command:
set -euo pipefail
ansible -i /tmp/yugabytedb-inventory.ini yugabytedb -b -m shell -a 'docker ps --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"'
